United States-India.notes: Indian eVisa can be applied online. Processing takes 3â€“5 business days.

EU_to_EU.notes: EU/EEA citizens enjoy freedom of movement and can live and work freely.

US_VWP_to_US.notes: Citizens of Visa Waiver Program countries must obtain ESTA. Stays up to 90 days.

STRONG_to_UK.notes: Up to 6 months visa-free for tourism/business.

DEFAULT_to_US.notes: A US visa must be obtained from a US embassy or consulate before travel.

DEFAULT_to_UK.notes: A UK visa must be applied for before travel.

DEFAULT_to_SCHENGEN.notes: A Schengen visa is required, applied at the embassy of the main destination.

STRONG_to_SCHENGEN.notes: Up to 90 days within a 180-day period in the Schengen Area without a visa.

DEFAULT_to_CANADA.notes: A Temporary Resident Visa (TRV) is required.

EXEMPT_to_CANADA.notes: Visa-exempt but an eTA required to fly to Canada.

ETA_to_AUSTRALIA.notes: An Electronic Travel Authority (ETA) is required. Apply online.

EVISA_to_AUSTRALIA.notes: Apply free online for an eVisitor visa. Stays up to 3 months.

ANY_to_INDIA.notes: Most nationalities can apply for an Indian eVisa online.

ANY_to_TURKEY.notes: Many nationalities can apply for a Turkish eVisa online.

STRONG_to_UAE.notes: Visa on arrival (30 days) for citizens of strong-passport countries.

DEFAULT_to_UAE.notes: A visa is required. Apply through a sponsor or online.

ANY_to_JAPAN.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Japanese embassy or consulate.

ANY_to_CHINA.notes: Most nationalities need a visa for China.

ANY_to_RUSSIA.notes: Most nationalities need a visa for Russia.

DEFAULT_to_BRAZIL.notes: A visa is required for Brazil.

MERCOSUR_to_BRAZIL.notes: MERCOSUR/associate member citizens can enter visa-free.

STRONG_to_NEW_ZEALAND.notes: Visa-free entry up to 3 months. NZeTA required before travel.

STRONG_to_ISRAEL.notes: Visa-free entry for up to 90 days for tourism.

DEFAULT_to_ISRAEL.notes: A visa must be obtained from an Israeli embassy or consulate.

STRONG_to_ARGENTINA.notes: Visa-free for up to 90 days for tourism.

DEFAULT_to_ARGENTINA.notes: A visa is required. Apply at an Argentine consulate.

STRONG_to_LATAM.notes: Visa-free entry for tourism. Duration varies by destination — check specific country rules.

DEFAULT_to_LATAM.notes: A visa is required. Apply at the relevant embassy or consulate.

STRONG_to_EGYPT.notes: Visa on arrival ($25 USD) or e-Visa available for eligible nationalities. Up to 30 days.

DEFAULT_to_EGYPT.notes: A visa must be obtained from an Egyptian embassy or consulate.

STRONG_to_JORDAN.notes: Visa on arrival (40 JOD) for eligible nationalities. Free with Jordan Pass.

DEFAULT_to_JORDAN.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Jordanian embassy or consulate.

ANY_to_CAMBODIA.notes: Visa on arrival ($30 USD) or e-Visa ($36) for 30 days. Available to most nationalities.

STRONG_to_ETHIOPIA.notes: e-Visa required. Apply online before travel.

DEFAULT_to_ETHIOPIA.notes: A visa is required. e-Visa or embassy application.

STRONG_to_KENYA.notes: All visitors require an eTA. Apply online before travel.

DEFAULT_to_KENYA.notes: Kenya eTA required for all visitors. Apply online.

STRONG_to_TANZANIA.notes: e-Visa required. Apply online before travel ($50 USD).

DEFAULT_to_TANZANIA.notes: A visa is required. e-Visa recommended.

STRONG_to_SAUDI.notes: Tourist e-Visa available online. Multiple entry, up to 90 days per visit.

DEFAULT_to_SAUDI.notes: A visa is required. Embassy application or sponsor needed.

STRONG_to_QATAR.notes: Visa waiver on arrival for up to 30 days (extendable) for eligible nationalities.

DEFAULT_to_QATAR.notes: A visa must be obtained through a sponsor or embassy.

STRONG_to_OMAN.notes: Tourist e-Visa available online for 10 or 30 days.

DEFAULT_to_OMAN.notes: A visa is required. Apply through e-Visa or embassy.

STRONG_to_BAHRAIN.notes: e-Visa or Visa on Arrival available for eligible nationalities. Up to 14 days.

DEFAULT_to_BAHRAIN.notes: A visa is required. Apply online or through embassy.

STRONG_to_KUWAIT.notes: e-Visa available online for eligible nationalities. Up to 90 days.

DEFAULT_to_KUWAIT.notes: A visa with a local sponsor is required.

STRONG_to_RWANDA.notes: Visa on arrival (30 days, $50) or e-Visa available for all nationalities.

DEFAULT_to_RWANDA.notes: Rwanda offers visa on arrival or e-Visa for all nationalities ($50, 30 days).

STRONG_to_GEORGIA.notes: Visa-free entry for 1 year for holders of strong passports.

DEFAULT_to_GEORGIA.notes: e-Visa available. Some nationalities also get visa-free access.

STRONG_to_SERBIA.notes: Visa-free entry for up to 90 days.

DEFAULT_to_SERBIA.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Serbian embassy or consulate.

STRONG_to_ALBANIA.notes: Visa-free entry for up to 90 days within 180 days.

DEFAULT_to_ALBANIA.notes: A visa must be obtained from an Albanian embassy or consulate.

STRONG_to_UKRAINE.notes: Visa-free entry for up to 90 days within 180 days.

DEFAULT_to_UKRAINE.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Ukrainian embassy.

STRONG_to_MOROCCO.notes: Visa-free for up to 90 days for eligible nationalities.

DEFAULT_to_MOROCCO.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Moroccan embassy.

STRONG_to_TUNISIA.notes: Visa-free entry for up to 90 days.

DEFAULT_to_TUNISIA.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Tunisian embassy.

STRONG_to_SOUTH_AFRICA.notes: Visa-free entry for up to 90 days.

DEFAULT_to_SOUTH_AFRICA.notes: A visa must be obtained from a South African embassy.

STRONG_to_PHILIPPINES.notes: Visa-free for up to 30 days for eligible nationalities.

DEFAULT_to_PHILIPPINES.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Philippine embassy.

ANY_to_LAOS.notes: Visa on arrival ($30-40 USD) for 30 days. Available at most border crossings.

ANY_to_MOZAMBIQUE.notes: Visa on arrival ($50 USD) for 30 days at major airports.

STRONG_to_MONGOLIA.notes: Visa-free for up to 30 days for eligible nationalities.

DEFAULT_to_MONGOLIA.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Mongolian embassy.

STRONG_to_MOLDOVA.notes: Visa-free entry for up to 90 days within 180 days.

DEFAULT_to_MOLDOVA.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Moldovan embassy.

ANY_to_ALGERIA.notes: All visitors require a visa. Apply at an Algerian embassy.

ANY_to_IRAN.notes: Visa on arrival at Tehran airport for most nationalities (not US/UK/Canada). e-Visa also available.

ANY_to_PAKISTAN.notes: e-Visa available for many nationalities. Visa on arrival for some.

ANY_to_NIGERIA.notes: A visa must be obtained before travel. Apply at a Nigerian embassy or online.

ANY_to_GHANA.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Ghanaian embassy.

ANY_to_CAMEROON.notes: A visa must be obtained from a Cameroonian embassy.

ANY_to_SENEGAL.notes: Senegal is visa-free for most nationalities for up to 90 days.

ANY_to_UGANDA.notes: e-Visa required. Apply online before travel.

ANY_to_ZAMBIA.notes: e-Visa or Visa on Arrival available for most nationalities ($50 USD).

ANY_to_ZIMBABWE.notes: Visa on arrival ($30-55 USD) at borders and airports for many nationalities.

ANY_to_LEBANON.notes: Visa on arrival for most nationalities (1 month, free). Not available to Israeli passport holders.

ANY_to_MYANMAR.notes: e-Visa ($50 USD) required for most nationalities. 28-day tourist stay.

ANY_to_KAZAKHSTAN.notes: Kazakhstan offers visa-free entry for up to 30 days for 74+ nationalities including most Western and Asian countries.

ANY_to_UZBEKISTAN.notes: Uzbekistan offers visa-free entry for up to 30 days for 90+ nationalities.

ANY_to_AZERBAIJAN.notes: ASAN e-Visa required ($23). Apply online. 30-day stay.

ANY_to_ARMENIA.notes: Armenia offers visa-free entry for up to 180 days for most nationalities.

ANY_to_BELARUS.notes: Visa-free for up to 30 days via Minsk Airport for 76+ nationalities. Travel insurance mandatory.

ANY_to_CUBA.notes: Tourist Card required ($20-100 depending on nationality). Available through airlines or embassy.

ANY_to_NORTH_KOREA.notes: Tourism only through approved tour operators. Visa must be arranged through tour agency. US citizens currently prohibited.

ANY_to_SOMALIA.notes: Visa on arrival available at Mogadishu airport. Situation highly volatile â€” check travel advisories.

ANY_to_YEMEN.notes: Visa required. Extreme travel advisory â€” most embassies recommend against travel.

ANY_to_SUDAN.notes: A visa is required. Apply at a Sudanese embassy. Israeli passport holders denied entry.

ANY_to_LIBYA.notes: Visa required. Extremely limited tourism. Check travel advisories.

ANY_to_IRAQ.notes: Kurdistan Region offers visa on arrival for many nationalities. Federal Iraq requires embassy visa.

ANY_to_AFGHANISTAN.notes: Visa required. Extreme travel advisory â€” most governments advise against all travel.

ANY_to_BANGLADESH.notes: Visa on arrival for some nationalities. e-Visa available for others.

ANY_to_VENEZUELA.notes: Visa-free for many nationalities (up to 90 days). Check current conditions and travel advisories.

United States.notes: Transit through the US ALWAYS requires ESTA or a valid US visa â€” there is no airside transit.

United Kingdom.notes: Direct Airside Transit Visa (DATV) may be required. Exemptions exist for holders of certain valid visas.

Germany.notes: Schengen Airport Transit Visa (ATV) required for listed nationalities.

France.notes: Schengen Airport Transit Visa (ATV) required for listed nationalities.

Netherlands.notes: Schengen ATV required for listed nationalities. Schiphol has good airside transit.

UAE.notes: Most nationalities can transit through UAE airports without a visa for up to 96 hours.

Qatar.notes: Most nationalities can transit through Doha without a visa. Free transit visa available.

Japan.notes: Transit passengers staying airside generally do not need a visa. Shore pass available.

Singapore.notes: Most nationalities can transit through Changi without a visa if staying airside.

South Korea.notes: Transit Without Visa (TWOV) at Incheon for many nationalities up to 72 hours.

India.notes: Transit visa required for all foreign nationals passing through Indian immigration.

Canada.notes: Transit may require a Transit Visa or an eTA.

Australia.notes: Transit visa (subclass 771) required if passing through Australian immigration.

Turkey.notes: Transit passengers staying airside at Istanbul Airport generally do not need a visa.

Brazil.notes: Transit passengers staying airside generally do not need a visa.

Malaysia.notes: Transit Without Visa (TWOV) up to 120 hours at KLIA for many nationalities.

Thailand.notes: Transit passengers do not need a visa if staying airside at Suvarnabhumi.

China.notes: 24/72/144-hour transit visa exemption at major airports for eligible nationalities.
